=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_withPipes.ts ---
// refactor: 8:13
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = () =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
      const test = "test"
      return yield* Effect.succeed(test)
    }).pipe(Effect.tapError(Effect.logError))


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_withPipes.ts ---
// refactor: 8:13
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = () =>
  Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* pipe(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
      const test = "test"
      return yield* Effect.succeed(test)
    }),
    Effect.tapError(Effect.logError)
  ) })


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"test\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_withPipes.ts ---
// refactor: 8:13
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = Effect.fn("test")(function* () {
    const test = "test";
    return yield* Effect.succeed(test);
}, Effect.tapError(Effect.logError));


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_withPipes.ts ---
// refactor: 8:13
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

const test = (): Effect.Effect<string, never, never> =>
  pipe(
    Effect.gen(function*() {
      const test = "test"
      return yield* Effect.succeed(test)
    }),
    Effect.tapError(Effect.logError)
  )
